name: SONIC AUTOMOTIVE INC
business: Sonic Automotive is one of the largest automotive retailers in the United States, operating three segments: Franchised Dealerships, EchoPark (pre-owned vehicles), and Powersports. It sells new and used vehicles, provides parts, service, and collision repair, and arranges third-party financing, extended warranties, and insurance products.

exposures.sentence: Changes in consumer demand toward fuel-efficient hybrid vehicles, plug-in hybrid electric vehicles and battery electric vehicles, and resulting shifts by manufacturers to meet demand, could disrupt our ongoing business or have a material adverse effect on our overall business and results of operations.

In 2024, CDK, a third-party provider of certain of our information systems, experienced a cybersecurity incident that resulted in temporary suspension of certain of the systems used by us, including our dealer management system (the DMS ), our customer relationship management system (the CRM ) and other systems that support sales, inventory and accounting functions (collectively with the DMS and CRM the Affected Systems ).

tamClaims.claim: During calendar year 2025, approximately 16.3 million new cars and 38.4 million used cars were sold in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: During calendar year 2025, approximately 16.3 million new cars and 38.4 million used cars were sold in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: According to industry sources, there were approximately 298.7 million light vehicles in operation in the U.S. as of December 31, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to industry sources, there were approximately 298.7 million light vehicles in operation in the U.S. as of December 31, 2025.
